This '''[[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]]''' was used by [[Drake Lo'gaan/Legends|Drake Lo'gaan]] and [[Ekria/Legends|Ekria]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] following the [[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)/Legends|Battle of Felucia]]. It was fitted with a [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]]. Lo'gaan piloted this speeder to [[landing platform NL1922]] where he confronted [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. The speeder was destroyed by pursuing [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]], though Drake survived the explosion.

[[File:DrakesAirspeeder1.jpg|thumb|left]]

==Appearances==
*''[[Evasive Action: End Game]]''
